name: Local NYC rules affecting law firm AI visibility?

mainEntity.name: Local NYC rules affecting law firm AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.description: **None specific; national directories rule, but NY courts highlight AI limits (non-privileged).** Visibility pure market-driven. **Key factors:** 1) SDNY rulings irrelevant; 2) Chambers dominance; 3) No regs; 4) Pattern focus. Ignore legal angles, chase listings. Standard everywhere.[4][3]
